steps.t: Ladrochan, the stable-master, can be found in the stables of Rivendell, west of the Last Homely House. Elrond has told you to speak with Ladrochan and…
Elrond is in his library in the Last Homely House of Rivendell, to the east of the stable. Ladrochan told you that Laerdan had left Rivendell two days…
